name: eidos-plugin-store
description: Discover and bootstrap Eidos Codex plugins from the Eidos Plugin Store.

interface.shortDescription: Find and add Eidos plugins from Codex.
interface.longDescription: The Eidos Plugin Store is the Codex entrypoint for Eidos plugins. It reads the public well-known catalog, recommends the right plugin for the job, and bootstraps install steps when direct install is not available yet.
defaultPrompt: Show me the Eidos plugins for this task.
Install or bootstrap the right Eidos plugin.
Read the Eidos Plugin Store catalog.
